title: Fig. 2 in ATP accumulation in early resting cyst formation towards cryptobiosis in Colpoda cucullus
author: Hakozaki, Shuntaro Hakozaki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Relative gene expression of ATP synthase beta chain by real time PCR analysis. The columns and attached bars represent the means and standard errors of 4 identical replicates, respectively. Double asterisks represent significant differences at p <0.01.
steps_raw: Fig. 2. Relative gene expression of ATP synthase beta chain by real time PCR analysis. The columns and attached bars represent the means and standard errors of 4 identical replicates, respectively. Double asterisks represent significant differences at p <0.01.
